data_attestation: Training data is limited to public Poker44 benchmark releases and miner-visible hand payloads from api.poker44.net. No validator-private live labels, human PII, or proprietary table data were used.
notes: Dual-branch benchmark stack with bounded live calibration.
private_data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-only live evaluation labels.
training_data_statement: Trained on public Poker44 benchmark releases fetched from https://api.poker44.net/api/v1/benchmark using miner-visible hand payloads.
